lifecycle.name: Capital Formation
lifecycle.description: Founder-side and operator-side fundraising — equity, debt, PE, fund formation

workers.name: Investor Relations
workers.capabilitySummary: Founder-side investor relations + capital formation co-pilot. Investor pipeline CRM (Approached → 1st mtg → 2nd mtg → diligence → term sheet → close). Apollo prospecting. Data room with scoped sharing and KYC. Cap table integration. Reg D / 506(b)/(c) compliance guardrails. Equity (KISS, SAFE, convertible, seed), debt placements, PE placements, fund formation. Communications via Marketing worker.
workers._status_note: Flipped to live 2026-05-09 per user-counsel attestation pattern (project_user_counsel_attestation_pattern.md). The user's counsel attests at worker activation; SOCIII AI is not the legal-review authority. End-to-end dogfood test passed 2026-05-09.

bundles.name: SOCIII Founder
bundles.description: Spine + Fundraise bundle for early-stage founders running a fundraise alongside the company.
bundles.replaces: $10K+/mo in solo-founder ops + investor relations support
